Please fill in the form below. 
**Most importantly, attach the game logs!** 
The required log files and their typical locations are listed at the bottom under "Logs Attachments".

## Q&A Section

Q: What it is your game version?
A: 

Q: Are you playing Single-Player, Host-Coop, or on a Dedicated Server?
A: 

Q: How many players were online (if Host-Coop or Dedicated)?
A: 

Q: Did you get a text notification above your character when the event started?
A: 

Q: Did you see a zombie icon near the in-game clock?
A: 

Q: Is zombie respawn enabled in your server settings?
A: 

Q: Were there any zombies around you right before the event started?
A: 

Q: How much in-game time has passed since the world started?
A: 

Q: How much in-game time has passed since the last Horde Rush event?
A: 

## Issue Description

Please provide more details on what went wrong. 
* **What did you expect to happen?** 
* **What happened instead?** 

## Logs Attachments

Please ensure you attach the relevant log files to this ticket:

* **For All:** 
  * `C:\Users\<username>\Zomboid\console.txt`
  * `C:\Users\<username>\Zomboid\Logs\<date>_DebugLog.txt`

* **For Host-Coop:**
  * `C:\Users\<username>\Zomboid\coop-console.txt`

* **For Dedicated Server:**
  * `~/Zomboid/server-console.txt`
  * `~/Zomboid/Logs/<date>_DebugLog.txt`
